$comment: Shipped-header CONSTANTS via the neutral JSON descriptor (Item 1, user §B 2026-06-22). `#include <limits.h>` -> limits.json (on shippedLibDirs); the semantic phase injects CHAR_BIT (=8) as a named integer constant. NO C `.h` ships in config — agnostic JSON, injected + folded. CHAR_BIT is used as a CONSTANT-EXPRESSION (array dimension `int buf[CHAR_BIT]`, the MF-1 const-eval direct-value arm) AND a value (index + return) -> 40+2 = 42. RED-ON-DISABLE: without the injection CHAR_BIT is undeclared (compile error); without the const-eval direct-value arm `int buf[CHAR_BIT]` fails loud (S_NonConstantArrayLength). The release arm confirms the full shipped pipeline exits 42.
